case_title: ROBERT CHASE ADAMS VS. JOSEPH CALDERON

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY JOSEPH CALDERON IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO MAY-06-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE IS GRANTED BECAUSE HE WAS IMPROPERLY SERVED. PLAINTIFF ROBERT CHASE ADAMS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSEPH CALDERON IS PRESENT. DAVID ERIC LIN TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND SET NEW TRIAL DATE. NEW TRIAL SET FOR MAY 6, 2021 AT 3:30 A.M DEPT. 506
CORRESPONDENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT CALDERON, JOSEPH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2021 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE MAILED TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED: ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-03-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT OF A $524.77 PAYMENT TO THE PLAINTIFF IN FIVE $100 INCREMENTS TO BE PAID ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH. THE SIXTH PAYMENT WILL BE FOR THE BALANCE OF $24.77. THE FIRST PAYMENT IS DUE ON JUN-15-2021, WITH A RESOLVE DATE OF NOV-15-2021. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE DECEMBER HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
RETURN MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER SENT TO DEFENDANT,UNABLE TO FORWARD.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-19-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-15-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506(W. TRUPEK 506)
REMARK: RETURN MAIL, REJECTION LETTER SENT DEFENDANT UNABLE TO FORWARD.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-02-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUN-03-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY ORDER OF THE COURT. (506/JR)

SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER (FOR JAN-15-2021 HEARING DATE) RETURNED. SENT TO:DEFENDANT - JOSEPH CALDERON; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD;HANDWRITTEN NOTE: RTS )

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADAMS, ROBERT CHASE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALDERON, JOSEPH $1,274.93 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,399.93 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CALDERON, JOSEPH HEARING SET FOR MAR-18-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-06-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-15-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ROBERT CHASE ADAMS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSEPH CALDERON IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT OF A $524.77 PAYMENT TO THE PLAINTIFF IN FIVE $100 INCREMENTS TO BE PAID ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH. THE SIXTH PAYMENT WILL BE FOR THE BALANCE OF $24.77. THE FIRST PAYMENT IS DUE ON JUN-15-2021, WITH A RESOLVE DATE OF NOV-15-2021. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE SUBSEQUENT HEARINGS IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THIS MATTER WILL BE GIVEN A FINAL CONTINUANCE AND DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE IF ALL PAYMENTS ARE MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AUG-19-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-15-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-15-2021 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF ROBERT CHASE ADAMS IS PRESENT. WITNESS FOR THE PLAINTIFF KYUMIN LEE. DEFENDANT JOSEPH CALDERON IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
